Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, Veyran gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
If you casting or copying an instant or sorcery spell causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.flavor: A captured elemental makes for a potent, albeit unstable, power source.

oracleCard.name: Storm-Kiln Artist
oracleCard.text:
This creature gets +1/+0 for each artifact you control.
Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

faces.flavor: "This is a tale to make all Kaldheim tremble..."
faces.name: Birgi, God of Storytelling
faces.text:
Whenever you cast a spell, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.
Creatures you control can boast twice during each of your turns rather than once.

faces.flavor: Like her well of stories, Birgi's horn never runs dry.
faces.name: Harnfel, Horn of Bounty
faces.text: Discard a card: Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards this turn.

oracleCard.name: Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty

card.flavor:
"The Multiverse itself is a never-ending act of creation. Do not look inward so often that you forget how to see it."
—Galazeth Prismari

oracleCard.name: Turbulent Springs
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
This land enters tapped unless your opponents control eight or more lands.

oracleCard.name: Fear of Missing Out
oracleCard.text:
When this creature enters, discard a card, then draw a card.
Delirium — Whenever this creature attacks for the first time each turn, if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, untap target creature. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.flavor:
"Gather your strength. Prepare yourself."
—Jeska, to Radha

oracleCard.name: Jeska's Will
oracleCard.text:
Choose one. If you control a commander as you cast this spell, you may choose both instead.
• Add {R} for each card in target opponent's hand.
• Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them this turn.

card.flavor: "I said *no*!"

oracleCard.name: Refute
oracleCard.text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.

faces.name: Emeritus of Ideation

card.flavor: Where There's Thunder, There's Lightning—Blaster Disaster Vaporizes Safety Inspector!

oracleCard.name: Electrodominance
oracleCard.text: Electrodominance deals X damage to any target. You may cast a spell with mana value X or less from your hand without paying its mana cost.

faces.name: Emeritus of Conflict
faces.text:
First strike
Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, this creature becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

faces.name: Lightning Bolt
faces.text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

card.flavor:
"The *artist* should suffer for their craft, not the audience!"
—Galazeth Prismari

oracleCard.name: Traumatic Critique
oracleCard.text: Traumatic Critique deals X damage to any target. Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.flavor: "Leave everything on the stage and give them a performance they'll never forget."

oracleCard.name: Zaffai and the Tempests
oracleCard.text: Once during each of your turns, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell from your hand without paying its mana cost.

oracleCard.name: Flusterstorm
oracleCard.text:
Counter target instant or sorcery spell unless its controller pays {1}.
Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

oracleCard.name: Big Score
oracleCard.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.flavor:
"Alone, we are but the heat, the air, and the kindling. Together, we are the ever-spreading flame."
—*The Sisters of Flame*

oracleCard.name: Pyretic Ritual
oracleCard.text: Add {R}{R}{R}.

card.flavor:
"To the tutors, a 'poem of sand' was of little account, a 'poem of ivory,' priceless."
—Afari, *Tales*

oracleCard.name: Mystical Tutor
oracleCard.text: Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
